series_metadata.series_description: These records document a school's participation in the following EdChoice Scholarship, Autism Scholarship, Cleveland Scholarship and/or Jon Peterson Scholarships. These records indicate how many years they have participated, how many students they serve, tuition schedules, school handbooks, attendance and admission requirements and payments.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain five years, provided the records have been audited by the Auditor of State and the audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved., Electronic: Delete
